Crafted item catalog

All crafted items in the DB at level ≤ 50, deduped, sub-quality variants stripped. Use the search box to narrow by name or item id, then click copy to put a single /summonitem command on your clipboard and paste it into EQ2 chat.

Other useful GM commands: /giveitem <player> <id> to hand to another player · /summonitem <id> 1 bank to bank instead of bag · /player coins add plat 100 for coin.
